tagline: Effortless Pool Care, Right Next Door

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Our Family's Personal
Promise
hero.subheadline: Michael and Cindy Sparks built Pools Nextdoor on one belief: every pool deserves the same care they give their own. Your dedicated technician handles everything so you just dive in.
checkmarks: Free water testing at our store

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From One<br class="hidden md:block"> Trusted Local Team
services.subtitle: From weekly cleanings to full remodels, Pools Nextdoor handles it all. One family-owned company, one dedicated technician, and zero runaround.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Your assigned technician handles all cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks weekly. After-service photos keep you in the loop without lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Pumps, filters, salt systems, heaters — our team diagnoses issues fast and provides honest repair-or-replace recommendations. No upselling, just solutions.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your tired pool into a backyard showpiece. Resurfacing, new tile, updated decking — our experienced crew handles the full renovation.

cards.title: Pool Supply Store
cards.description: Visit our Seminole retail store for everything pool-related. Walk in for a free water test and leave with expert advice and the exact products you need.

cards.title: Saltwater Conversions
cards.description: Switch to a gentler, lower-maintenance saltwater system. We handle the full conversion including equipment selection, installation, and ongoing support.

cards.title: Pool Heater Installation
cards.description: Extend your swim season with a professionally installed pool heater. We size, install, and maintain your system so you swim comfortably year-round.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Care

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Call or fill out our form. We'll visit your pool, test your water, and give you an honest recommendation — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: Meet Your Dedicated Technician
steps.description: We assign one technician to your pool who learns its quirks and keeps it perfect. You'll get after-service photos and same-week availability.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready every day. If something ever feels off, we're right next door and will make it right — that's our family promise.

about.label: Why Pinellas County Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats Your Pool Like Their Own
about.description: Michael and Cindy Sparks started Pools Nextdoor in 2020 with a simple idea: pool care should feel personal. Six years and 311+ five-star reviews later, that idea drives everything we do. Every customer gets a dedicated technician, after-service photos, and the confidence that comes from working with people who genuinely care.

features.title: Dedicated Technician, Every Visit
features.description: No rotating crews. Your assigned technician knows your pool inside and out and shows up on the same day every week.

features.title: After-Service Photos, Every Time
features.description: We send photos after every visit so you see exactly what was done — total transparency without being home.

features.title: Same-Week Service Guaranteed
features.description: Need help fast? We offer same-week scheduling for new customers and priority service for existing ones.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Financing available for larger projects — no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Right Next Door" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. We're not some faceless corporation — we're your neighbors, and our family's reputation is on the line with every pool we touch.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get on the schedule?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are set up within the same week. Call us or fill out the form and we'll find a day that works for you — often within 2-3 days.

faqs.question: Will I get the same technician every visit?
faqs.answer: Yes! We assign a dedicated technician to your pool who comes on the same day each week. They learn your pool's specific needs and keep it in peak condition.

faqs.question: Do you offer free pool water testing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Stop by our retail store in Seminole anytime for a free, comprehensive water test. We'll walk you through the results and recommend exactly what your pool needs.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold Florida Pool Contractor License CPC 1460567, we're BBB Accredited, and we carry full liability insurance. Your property is always protected.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for larger projects?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer financing options for equipment replacements, remodeling, and renovation projects. Ask us about flexible payment plans when you request your free estimate.

testimonials.name: Gary K.
testimonials.text: We have been more than pleased with Pools Next Door and specifically Kristy. She cares for our pool as she would her own, and she is both friendly and professional.

testimonials.name: Sasha S.
testimonials.text: 10 star service! They were originally recommended to me by a competitor of theirs. You can tell the owner here cares about each job they do. Outstanding work.

testimonials.name: Taylor C.
testimonials.text: Absolutely outstanding experience with Pools Next Door! From start to finish, this company goes above and beyond. Owners Michael and Cindy are incredibly professional, responsive, and truly care.

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure pool assessment from a family that treats your pool like their own. Same-week scheduling available throughout Pinellas County.
benefits: Free pool water test with every assessment
